# EstateReady

> A guided estate planning assessment that scores your readiness across 7 domains and produces a structured report you can bring to an attorney.

EstateReady is a pay-per-report tool ($21 one-time) that helps individuals understand where their estate planning stands before engaging an attorney. It is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

## What it does

- 37-question intake across 7 estate planning domains
- Scoring engine (0–100) with 4 tiers: Foundational, Developing, Complex, Urgent
- AI-generated report with tier verdict, priority actions, and domain-level findings
- Report delivered via a one-time magic link (valid 1 year)

## Key pages

- [Home](https://willestateready.com): Marketing and intake entry point
- [Sample Report](https://willestateready.com/sample-report): Example Tier 3 report for a fictional individual
- [Privacy Policy](https://willestateready.com/privacy): Data collection and handling
- [Disclaimer](https://willestateready.com/disclaimer): Not legal advice, not a law firm

## 7 Assessment domains

1. Will & Trust
2. Asset Titling
3. Beneficiary Designations
4. Healthcare Directives
5. Financial Power of Attorney
6. Guardian Designations
7. Digital & Business Assets

## Intended audience

Individuals who have not yet started estate planning, or those who have partial plans in place and want to understand gaps before meeting with an attorney.

## Pricing

$21 per report · one-time · no subscription · no renewal

## Contact

support@willestateready.com
